name: FICA Tax Credits & Refunds - Audit Defense for FICA Tax Credits
description: Professional Audit Defense for FICA Tax Credits services in Minneapolis. A compliance-first tax consultancy service helping restaurants, bars and nightclubs CPA/accountants learn how to gain tax credits and refunds. We specialize in leveraging federal programs to capture tax credits and maximize FICA tax refunds for the past 3 years to increase profitability for businesses. Get exact numbers the IRS owes you at no charge. No fees unless you receive a refund, only then do we charge a small percentage of that refund/credit you receive.
